description_long: This is a crumpled, light brown paper grocery bag with a worn and wrinkled surface, suggesting it has been used or handled multiple times. The bag features a colorful printed design on one side, including red and green graphics and partial text, likely indicating branding or a store logo. The top of the bag is irregularly gathered and partially closed, with jagged, uneven edges and no visible handles. The bag appears partially full, as its shape is bulging and not flat, but it is not completely stuffed. No groceries or items are visibly protruding from the opening or through the paper. The overall appearance is that of a typical grocery bag discarded or left on an urban sidewalk or near a storefront.
description: A crumpled, light brown paper grocery bag with colorful printed graphics and a partially closed, jagged top. The bag is partially full and shows signs of wear.
description_view_0: The bag is seen from the side, highlighting the jagged, partially closed top and the wrinkled, bulging body.
description_view_1: This view shows the opposite side, focusing on the plain, unprinted surface and the irregular, folded top edge.
description_view_2: The printed design with red and green graphics and partial text is visible, along with the bag's bulging shape.
description_view_3: The front of the bag displays the most complete view of the printed design and text, with the bag's fullness and wrinkled texture clearly visible.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Printed design with red and green graphics and partial text, possibly store branding.
